title: Zoro Tracks the Real Pica
description: Pages 9–13 focus on zoro tracks the real pica, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as pica's giant stone body threatens the plateau, and Zoro prepares to cut through Dressrosa itself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You might be worried, but this is a duel between men!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: promise you I'll win; just let me do it my way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I ain't gonna let you bastards become slaves again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Uaaah! Go Fraland!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fufu...you sure do know how to let a man enjoy his booze, don't ya!, boy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'll remember yer words!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I ain't as young as I used to be, y'kno... you'll excuse me if I aim to finish this with this next one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Before that, let us butt in with a comment about how far away you are, senior!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Senior! You're really far away!

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: You understand what you just said, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: You've gone and said you'll take all my punches, no questions asked.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If what they say is true and men never go back on their word...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Take this and try to survive it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: If you somehow manage to stand up after this,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It'll be my loss!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'll eat whatever attack you throw my way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You got a deal!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: WhoAAAA! He swum up that tower!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: What in the world is he...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: The sky's Sadder today than I'd like, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: If only I could keep going like this....I'd be able to see her... my Lucy Anne.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Lucy Anne?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: My son, Gimlet, too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: But gravity comes between us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Oi, what the hell are you going on about!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: CyBorg! Your back's still flesh and blood, ain't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: You bastard... you knew all along and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Better keep that mouth of yers shut unless you wanna bite your tongue off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: YAAA Argh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: MEOW- MEOW SUPLEX

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Baby Buster.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: FRA- Land!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Whereze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: ...Well, shit.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Forgive me, young master!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Franky Iron Boxing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: That's right... now that I think about it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Lucy Anne!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: The day I met you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: And the day you stopped laughing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: It was raining just this hard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: "I remember...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Kyah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: It really started pouring, didn't it? Ahaha~

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: But I love it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: The rain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Things I don't like?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: pirates! I hate them more than anything else in this world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: What do you do for a living?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Ah, er... at a bank, I, uh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: A banker, huh!

summary: Zoro Tracks the Real Pica advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
